changelog: ➕ Added configurable security scaling for each robbery level
➕ Added support for multiple indoor guard spawn locations per house
➕ Added support for configurable outside guard spawn locations
➕ Added proximity-based outside guard spawning before entering the house
➕ Added configurable outside guard spawn, aggro, and despawn distances
➕ Added configurable guard stats including health, accuracy, weapon, shoot rate, and reaction thresholds
➕ Added configurable noise wake-up threshold so guards react to loud robberies
🔧 Fixed the sound bar so it now decreases when the player does not make any noise
🔧 Outside guards now properly guard the house exterior before entry
🔧 Outside guards now use the same aggressive combat behavior as inside guards
🔧 Improved higher robbery levels with more dangerous and better scaled guards
🔧 Fixed issue where outside guards could respawn after being killed before entry
🔧 Fixed multiple runtime errors caused by ped natives
🔧 Improved exterior NPC spawning to prevent invisible or broken guards
🔧 Added better cleanup and reset handling for robbery guard states
🔧 Added support for house-specific guard position setups for better robbery variety
🔧 Improved overall robbery flow so exterior and interior guard systems work together more reliably
🔧 Fixed outside guard combat behavior where NPCs could aim at the player without properly attacking
🔧 Fixed outside guard spawn timing issues related to robbery interior/exterior transitions
🔧 Improved guard combat setup compatibility across different runtime environments
